title: Lesson 27
paragraph: This lesson practices simple verbs for moving and doing things.

words.meaning: to make something stop working or become pieces
words.example: Do not break the glass cup.

words.meaning: to take something or someone to a place
words.japaneseMeaning: 持ってくる／連れてくる
words.example: Please bring your notebook to class.

words.meaning: to make something by putting parts together
words.example: They build a small house near the river.

words.meaning: to stop a plan from happening
words.example: We cancel the picnic because it is raining.
Can you carry this bag for me?

words.meaning: to stop and hold something moving
words.example: He can catch the ball with one hand.

words.meaning: to pick one thing from two or more
words.example: Choose one color for your bag.

words.meaning: to look at two things and see how they are different or the same
words.example: Compare the two pictures and find five changes.

words.meaning: to say that something is wrong or bad
words.example: Please do not complain about the food before you try it.
